summary: Added 5 narrative paragraphs before naked visuals (DT market table, Physical AI table, Data Greenhouse architecture, competitive capability table, reference product table)
Unified header logo size from h-7 to h-8 md:h-10 to match post header logo
Added 3 narrative paragraphs: market trend details before chart, 4-pattern overview before tabs, layer descriptions before cycle-loop diagram

Added operational evidence causality explanation, Data Flywheel 3-mechanism detail (intelligence internalization, reinforcement cycle, asset appreciation), PoC strategy progressive deepening rationale
Added 4 narrative paragraphs: historical context for definition, 2025 market stats intro before stat cards, edge infra 3 pillars before feature cards, report collection intro
Added missing mainTitle and subtitle to PebblousPage.init config — enables hero h1, breadcrumbs, Article Schema, Author Schema

Added Section 8 Future Works (content balance, art visibility, data-driven decisions, cross-pillar content, bilingual completion roadmap) and converted mono-language KO post to bilingual KO+EN structure with redirect stub
Indy Art bilingual post (KO+EN) created from source MD. Standard PebblousPage layout, art category. images.yaml for image placement planning.
Renamed Indy Art to Robotic Painting (Pebblous branding). External quotes (ZDNet) preserved as-is.
Converted offset-curves-1999.html to bilingual ko/en directory structure with redirect stubs
Converted pebbly-evolution-01.html to bilingual ko/en directory structure with redirect stubs, updated hreflang, canonical, OG URLs, and FAQ schemas per language
Converted blog-future-vision.html to bilingual KO/EN directory structure with interactive demos, card flipping, CSS transitions preserved
Converted 5259-pbls-dataclinic-01.html to bilingual KO+EN structure. Original replaced with SEO redirect. Published in articles.json.
Created bilingual IR hub page (ko/en) with article card grid, particle animation, FAQ Schema, SEO (canonical, hreflang, OG, Twitter), redirect stub

Added narrative paragraphs before visual elements (tables, card grids) in both KO and EN versions. 8 insertion points per language: Section 2 comparison table bridge + after-table explanation, Section 4 action grid intro + writeback table intro + after-table explanation, Section 5 RAG vs OAG intro + AIP Logic tools intro, Section 6 comparison intro, Section 7 use cases intro, Section 8 key implications bridge + expanded card descriptions.
Added ISO official links to standard names in ISO5259 hub pages (ko/en). ISO/IEC 5259→iso.org/standard/81088, ISO/IEC 25012→iso.org/standard/35736, ISO/IEC 25024→iso.org/standard/35749
Integrated theme system into 404 page — replaced hardcoded dark with CSS variables, added FOUC prevention script, integrated PebblousComponents.loadAll() + PebblousTheme.init()

Added narrative paragraphs before visual elements in 4 sections (timeline evolution cards, comparison flow diagrams, radar chart, case study cards). Also fixed text-gray-500 to themeable-text for theme compatibility in radar chart intro.

Created PebblousHubCards common module — replaces inline JS in hub pages with shared card rendering (4-col responsive grid, image/video/GIF/particle cascade, tag scroll, featured badges, show more/less pagination). Migrated ISO5259 ko/en and IR ko/en hub pages. Moved hub CSS to css/styles.css.
카드 렌더링 통합: card-renderer.js 공통 모듈 추출, articles.js/hub-cards.js 중복 제거 (636줄→350줄), card-particles.js 설정 가능화 + idle/hover 가시성 강화

Added lock icon for password-protected posts. articles.json gets locked:true field, card-renderer.js shows lock badge (SVG padlock) next to date/featured badge, CSS in styles.css with hover accent color transition.
합성데이터 허브 페이지 생성 (KO+EN) — PebbloSim, PhysicalAI, DataGreenhouse 관련 기사 통합. new-hub 스킬 신규 생성.
데이터클리닉 허브 페이지 생성 (KO+EN) — DataClinic 핵심 기사 + ISO5259 매핑 기사 통합

Created bilingual February 2026 review report (KO+EN). Covers 3-day agentic sprint: 128 articles, 45 bilingual pairs, 9 Claude Skills, 3 new modules, +131K lines. Includes code frequency chart, batch timeline, skill grid, issue tracker. SEO 22/22 both versions.
PhysicalAI Hub 이중언어 허브 페이지 생성 (KO+EN). 12개 기사(6쌍) 종합, 시리즈 가이드 6편, FAQ 5개, OG 이미지 생성

Structural modernization (data-theme, JSON-LD removal, CSS order fix, Pretendard font, cache bust, apple-touch-icon, Twitter Card) + 8-section text enrichment from source MDs (autonomous data OS framing, interpretation layer, Human-in-the-Loop accountability, neuro-symbolic design principles, Platform Adapter write-back, wedge strategy, System of Record) + config.faqs 7 items

Structural modernization (data-theme, JSON-LD removal, CSS order fix, Pretendard font, cache bust, apple-touch-icon, Twitter Card) + 8-section text enrichment from source MD (AADS Phase 2 positioning, Zero Physical Hallucination, differentiator overview, Data OS workflow, Greenhouse business value, automotive scenario rationale, risk management framework, paradigm shift vision) + config.faqs 6 items
Created bilingual locked IR page: 2025 Financial Performance & 2026 Growth Strategy investor report with password protection, stat-cards, compare-cards
Added intro paragraph before 2.1 stat-cards, closing runway note after 2.3 stat-cards, investment detail paragraph before Section 4 stat-cards

IR Press Room: single-password virtual data room. Created pbls-auth.js shared auth module, extracted password modal CSS into common-styles.css, refactored 9 protected pages to use shared module, created bilingual Press Room pages (ko/en), added CTA to IR Hub.
Section 3 세분화: 확정 22억(R&D 19억+매출 3억), 예정 10.3억 파이프라인 상세 + 매출소스별 설명 추가 + TOC 서브링크

Font system overhaul: Noto Sans KR → Pretendard single font + CSS variables (--font-sans, --font-display, --font-mono). Removed Google Fonts CDN from 108 files, added Pretendard CDN. Display font Outfit added for h1-h6 headings.
Added type:hub field to 8 hub articles for auto-exclusion from hub card grids; removed manual excludePaths from 8 hub HTML files
